title_en: Bread Battle: Ezekiel vs. Commercial Slices
title_es: Batalla de Pan: Ezekiel vs. Rebanadas Comerciales
hook_en: Look at this bread! Which one is healthier?
key_message: Ezekiel bread has fewer ingredients, no preservatives, and boosts nutrient absorption.
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Grains & Bakery]:
• HEALTHY: Ezekiel bread (frozen organic sprouted, no preservatives — just sprouted grains, lentils, soybeans)
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Commercial sliced bread (preservatives like calcium propionate, DATEM, soybean oil, added sugar)
• KEY FACT: Sprouted grain bread increases nutrient bioavailability by 30-50% and breaks down phytic acid, which blocks mineral absorption in regular bread
• VISUAL IDEA: Compare ingredient lists side by side — 6 ingredients vs. 30+. Show that Ezekiel bread lives in the freezer because it has zero preservatives

title_en: Freezer Fresh: The Truth About Sprouted Bread
title_es: Frescura del Congelador: La Verdad sobre el Pan Germinado
hook_en: Why is this bread in the freezer? Let me show you!
hook_es: ¿Por qué este pan está en el congelador? ¡Déjame mostrarte!
key_message: Sprouted grain bread, like Ezekiel, needs no preservatives and increases nutrient bioavailability.
_source_food_context:
